chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4259 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA 17548/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.09.2025 M/s. Muhammad Ahmed Masood and Syed Naved Warsi, advocates for the petitioner. Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for respondent. Mr. M. Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that the subject matter is ceased before the competent authority. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the response required to be filed by the petitioner before the concerned officer shall be filed latest by tomorrow. Learned counsel for respondent states that subject to the required response being submitted as aforesaid, the proceedings shall be concluded within five working days thereof. Learned counsel further states that subject to the aforesaid, the department shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner till rendering of the final order. It is jointly submitted that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge M. Khan
